_comment_1: packages/config/pint.json — the shared Laravel Pint (code style) config for every backend package.
_comment_2: Pint does not have an 'includes' mechanism like PHPStan. Each package either copies this file into its root OR points at it via a composer script that calls `pint --config=../../packages/config/pint.json`. The workspace convention is: this is the single source of truth; per-package overrides are rare + reviewed.
_comment_3: Preset chosen: 'laravel' — the maintained standard for Laravel projects. Adds strict types, single-quote strings, aligned array syntax, phpdoc-summary discipline, class-attribute ordering, and typed_class_constants (PHP 8.3+).
_comment_4: Rules below OVERRIDE / EXTEND the Laravel preset. Each entry MUST carry a rationale comment naming why it deviates from the preset.

rules._comment_declare_strict_types: Every non-config PHP file declares strict types per `.kiro/steering/conventions.md`.
rules._comment_class_attributes_separation: One blank line between constants + properties; two blank lines between methods. Matches every hand-authored class in the workspace.
rules._comment_ordered_imports: Alphabetical use imports so that imports across a class read as a discoverable list.
rules._comment_no_unused_imports: PHPStan level max catches these too, but Pint fixes them automatically on `lint:fix`.
rules._comment_single_quote: String literals use single quotes unless interpolating or escaping. Matches Laravel core.
rules._comment_trailing_comma: Trailing commas in every multi-line array/method call. Reduces diff noise on adds.
rules._comment_binary_operator_spaces: Never align = signs across statements. Aligned = drifts as the longest identifier changes.
rules._comment_concat_space: Single space around . concatenation. Matches Laravel core.
rules._comment_phpdoc_align: Docblock params + returns aligned in a single column — reads better in wide files.
rules._comment_phpdoc_order: Fixed docblock tag order: summary → description → @param → @return → @throws → @see → @deprecated.
rules._comment_phpdoc_separation: Blank line between the summary/description block and the @tag group; blank line between @param/@return group and @throws.
rules._comment_native_function_invocation: Prefix native functions with \ inside namespaced code (\count, \array_map) — small perf win + explicit intent.
rules._comment_no_superfluous_phpdoc_tags: Remove @param/@return tags that add nothing over the signature — the workspace docblock rule requires tags to add facts, not restate signatures.
